obsidian-ground.$description: Obsidian Ground — Page background — the absolute black base all gradients and glows emerge from

deep-charcoal.$description: Deep Charcoal — Nav bar background, footer, elevated surface one step above absolute black

graphite.$description: Graphite — Most-used color on site; borders, dividers, muted icon strokes, body text secondary contexts

iron.$description: Iron — Subtle borders, inactive state outlines

slate.$description: Slate — Secondary body text, muted icon fills

silver.$description: Silver — Tertiary icons, ghost button labels, disabled states

fog.$description: Fog — Body text on dark backgrounds, list items, secondary link labels

pure-white.$description: Pure White — Primary headings, button labels on dark, high-emphasis body text

electric-blue.$description: Electric Blue — Primary link color, info badges, active state highlights — the most-used chromatic color site-wide, giving the dark UI its cool electric temperature

violet-pulse.$description: Violet Pulse — Button borders, badge backgrounds, primary CTA outlines — the core violet brand hue from the JetBrains logo

iris.$description: Iris — Badge fills, body accent — slightly darker violet variant for surfaces needing more saturation

amethyst.$description: Amethyst — Heading accent color, primary dark-theme color token (--rs-color-primary-dark-theme)

deep-violet.$description: Deep Violet — CTA button background — deep space purple that pairs with Electric Blue (#18a3fa) text for a neon-on-void feel

neon-pink.$description: Neon Pink — Category labels ('For businesses', 'For developers'), brand highlight moments — the signature hot-pink neon that fires sparingly against black like a neon sign (--main-page-pink)

magenta-glow.$description: Magenta Glow — Gradient start color for violet nebula gradient, card border accents

nebula-violet.$description: Nebula Violet — Hero gradient bloom origin

aurora-teal.$description: Aurora Teal — Section accent headings, icon fills, gradient stop — teal-to-blue gradient used on feature callouts

hero-blue-glow.$description: Hero Blue Glow — Radial glow behind hero content — the deep blue spotlight effect that dominates the first viewport

danger-red.$description: Danger Red — Error states, destructive actions (--rs-color-danger)

jetbrains-sans.$description: The single typeface for the entire site at all sizes and weights. 600 at 72-79px for hero headlines — unusual that even at this weight the custom letterSpacing tightening (-0.005em to -0.001em) keeps the large type dense and technical rather than editorial. Weight 300 appears at mid-sizes giving subheadings a lighter counterpoint to bold display text. JetBrains Sans is custom-designed — it carries optical metrics tuned for code-adjacent contexts, slightly wider than Inter at body sizes, with liga/calt features active that echo the IDE typographic environment.

void.$description: Surface level 0: Absolute page background — the black base from which all gradients emerge

deep-charcoal.$description: Surface level 1: Navigation bar, footer — surfaces that need to sit above the background but below content cards

violet-glass.$description: Surface level 2: Translucent violet card fills (rgba(90,31,208,0.3)) — feature announcement cards, business section panels

pink-glass.$description: Surface level 3: Translucent pink card fills (rgba(243,17,180,0.2)) — highlight feature cards for specific products
